talents.name: Unbreakable Will
talents.description: Increases your chance to resist Stun, Fear, and Silence effects by an additional 3%.

talents.name: Wand Specialization
talents.description: Increases your damage with Wands by 5%.

talents.name: Silent Resolve
talents.description: Reduces the threat generated by your Holy and Discipline spells by 4% and reduces the chance your spells will be dispelled by 4%.

talents.name: Improved Power Word: Fortitude
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Power Word: Fortitude and Prayer of Fortitude spells by 15%.

talents.name: Improved Power Word: Shield
talents.description: Increases the damage absorbed by your Power Word: Shield by 5%.

talents.name: Martyrdom
talents.description: Gives you a 50% chance to gain the Focused Casting effect that lasts for 6 sec after being the victim of a melee or ranged critical strike. The Focused Casting effect prevents you from losing casting time when taking damage while casting Priest spells and increases resistance to Interrupt effects by 10%. (Proc chance: 50%)

talents.name: Absolution
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Dispel Magic, Cure Disease, Abolish Disease and Mass Dispel spells by 5%.

talents.name: Inner Focus
talents.description: When activated, reduces the mana cost of your next spell by 100% and increases its critical effect chance by 25% if it is capable of a critical effect.

talents.name: Meditation
talents.description: Allows 10% of your mana regeneration to continue while casting.

talents.name: Improved Inner Fire
talents.description: Increases the armor bonus of your Inner Fire spell by 10%.

talents.name: Mental Agility
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your instant cast spells by 2%.

talents.name: Improved Mana Burn
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Mana Burn spell by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Mental Strength
talents.description: Increases your maximum mana by 2%.

talents.name: Divine Spirit
talents.description: Holy power infuses the target, increasing their Spirit by 17 for 30 min.

talents.name: Improved Divine Spirit
talents.description: Your Divine Spirit and Prayer of Spirit spells also increase the target's spell damage and healing by an amount equal to 5% of their total Spirit.

talents.name: Focused Power
talents.description: Your Smite, Mind Blast and Mass Dispel spells have an additional 2% chance to hit. In addition, your Mass Dispel cast time is reduced by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Force of Will
talents.description: Increases your spell damage by 1% and the critical strike chance of your offensive spells by 1%.

talents.name: Focused Will
talents.description: After taking a critical hit you gain the Focused Will effect, reducing all damage taken by 2% and increasing healing effects on you by 4%. Stacks up to 3 times. Lasts 8 sec.

talents.name: Power Infusion
talents.description: Infuses the target with power, increasing spell casting speed by 20% and reducing the mana cost of all spells by 20%. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Reflective Shield
talents.description: Causes 10% of the damage absorbed by your Power Word: Shield to reflect back at the attacker. This damage causes no threat.

talents.name: Enlightenment
talents.description: Increases your total Stamina, Intellect and Spirit by 1%.

talents.name: Pain Suppression
talents.description: Instantly reduces a friendly target's threat by 5%, reduces all damage taken by 40% and increases resistance to Dispel mechanics by 65% for 8 sec.

talents.name: Healing Focus
talents.description: Gives you a 35% chance to avoid interruption caused by damage while casting any healing spell.

talents.name: Improved Renew
talents.description: Increases the amount healed by your Renew spell by 5%.

talents.name: Holy Specialization
talents.description: Increases the critical effect chance of your Holy spells by 1%.

talents.name: Spell Warding
talents.description: Reduces all spell damage taken by 2%.

talents.name: Divine Fury
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Smite, Holy Fire, Heal and Greater Heal spells by 0.1 sec.

talents.name: Holy Nova
talents.description: Causes an explosion of holy light around the caster, causing 29 to 34 Holy damage to all enemy targets within 10 yards and healing all party members within 10 yards for 54 to 63. These effects cause no threat.

talents.name: Blessed Recovery
talents.description: After being struck by a melee or ranged critical hit, heal 8% of the damage taken over 6 sec.

talents.name: Inspiration
talents.description: Increases your target's armor by 8% for 15 sec after getting a critical effect from your Flash Heal, Heal, Greater Heal, Binding Heal, Prayer of Healing, or Circle of Healing spell.

talents.name: Holy Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Smite and Holy Fire spells and the radius of your Prayer of Healing, Holy Nova and Circle of Healing spells by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Healing
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Lesser Heal, Heal, and Greater Heal spells by 5%.

talents.name: Searing Light
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Smite and Holy Fire spells by 5%.

talents.name: Healing Prayers
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Prayer of Healing and Prayer of Mending spell by 10%.

talents.name: Spirit of Redemption
talents.description: Increases total Spirit by 5% and upon death, the priest becomes the Spirit of Redemption for 15 sec. The Spirit of Redemption cannot move, attack, be attacked or targeted by any spells or effects. While in this form the priest can cast any healing spell free of cost. When the effect ends, the priest dies.

talents.name: Spiritual Guidance
talents.description: Increases spell damage and healing by up to 5% of your total Spirit.

talents.name: Surge of Light
talents.description: Your spell criticals have a 25% chance to cause your next Smite spell to be instant cast, cost no mana but be incapable of a critical hit. This effect lasts 10 sec. (Proc chance: 25%)

talents.name: Spiritual Healing
talents.description: Increases the amount healed by your healing spells by 2%.

talents.name: Holy Concentration
talents.description: Gives you a 2% chance to enter a Clearcasting state after casting any Flash Heal, Binding Heal, or Greater Heal spell. The Clearcasting state reduces the mana cost of your next Flash Heal, Binding Heal, or Greater Heal spell by 100%. (Proc chance: 2%)

talents.name: Lightwell
talents.description: Creates a Holy Lightwell. Members of your raid or party can click the Lightwell to restore 801 health over 6 sec. Any damage taken will cancel the effect. Lightwell lasts for 3 min or 5 charges.

talents.name: Blessed Resilience
talents.description: Critical hits made against you have a 20% chance to prevent you from being critically hit again for 6 sec. (Proc chance: 20%)

talents.name: Empowered Healing
talents.description: Your Greater Heal spell gains an additional 4% and your Flash Heal and Binding Heal gain an additional 2% of your bonus healing effects.

talents.name: Circle of Healing
talents.description: Heals friendly target and that target's party members within 15 yards of the target for 250 to 274.

talents.name: Spirit Tap
talents.description: Gives you a 20% chance to gain a 100% bonus to your Spirit after killing a target that yields experience or honor. For the duration, your mana will regenerate at a 50% rate while casting. Lasts 15 sec. (Proc chance: 20%)

talents.name: Blackout
talents.description: Gives your Shadow damage spells a 2% chance to stun the target for 3 sec. (Proc chance: 2%)

talents.name: Shadow Affinity
talents.description: Reduces the threat generated by your Shadow spells by 8%.

talents.name: Improved Shadow Word: Pain
talents.description: Increases the duration of your Shadow Word: Pain spell by 3 sec.

talents.name: Shadow Focus
talents.description: Reduces your target's chance to resist your Shadow spells by 2%.

talents.name: Improved Psychic Scream
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Psychic Scream spell by 2 sec.

talents.name: Improved Mind Blast
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Mind Blast spell by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Mind Flay
talents.description: Assault the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing 75 Shadow damage over 3 sec and slowing their movement speed by 50%.

talents.name: Improved Fade
talents.description: Decreases the cooldown of your Fade ability by 3 sec.

talents.name: Shadow Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your offensive Shadow spells by 10%.

talents.name: Shadow Weaving
talents.description: Your Shadow damage spells have a 20% chance to cause your target to be vulnerable to Shadow damage. This vulnerability increases the Shadow damage dealt to your target by 2% and lasts 15 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

talents.name: Silence
talents.description: Silences the target, preventing them from casting spells for 5 sec.

talents.name: Vampiric Embrace
talents.description: Afflicts your target with Shadow energy that causes all party members to be healed for 15% of any Shadow spell damage you deal for 1 min.

talents.name: Improved Vampiric Embrace
talents.description: Increases the percentage healed by Vampiric Embrace by an additional 5%.

talents.name: Focused Mind
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Mind Blast, Mind Control and Mind Flay spells by 5%.

talents.name: Shadow Resilience
talents.description: Reduces the chance you'll be critically hit by all spells by 2%.

talents.name: Darkness
talents.description: Increases your Shadow spell damage by 2%.

talents.name: Shadowform
talents.description: Assume a Shadowform, increasing your Shadow damage by 15% and reducing Physical damage done to you by 15%. However, you may not cast Holy spells while in this form.

talents.name: Shadow Power
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death spells by 3%.

talents.name: Misery
talents.description: Your Shadow Word: Pain, Mind Flay and Vampiric Touch spells also cause the target to take an additional 1% spell damage.

talents.name: Vampiric Touch
talents.description: Causes 450 Shadow damage over 15 sec to your target and causes all party members to gain mana equal to 5% of any Shadow spell damage you deal.
